title: tephrosia pumila var. ciliata
intro: Tephrosia pumila var. ciliata, also known as the small or dwarf hoary pea, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Tephrosia pumila var. ciliata can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
